untranslatable_reason: Pattern identification as 'right-angled broadening formation' or 'descending broadening formation' requires structural multi-bar pattern recognition (expanding volatility envelope, specific leg formations) which cannot be reduced to single-bar indicator conditions. The broadening formation's geometric structure—convergence followed by divergence with alternating higher highs/lows (right-angled) or descending lows with expanding highs—requires shape recognition beyond point-in-time indicator values. Breakout confirmation and stops are translatable, but core pattern structure detection is not.
